name: Command Palette
description: Spotlight-style command palette with keyboard navigation, grouped results, and optional async search.

items.description: Static items: [{id, label, icon?, group?, keywords?, shortcut?, url?, action?}]

footer.description: Custom footer content (replaces default keyboard hints)

decision_rule: Use as global search overlay triggered by Cmd+K. Place once per page layout. In Filament admin, use built-in global search instead.

filament_equivalent.note: Filament has built-in global search — use that in admin context
